engineIntelligence.h2: Chevrolet Traverse Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the 3.6L V6 engines fitted to the Chevrolet Traverse in the UK, including documented timing chain failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Chevrolet Traverse LLT engine - petrol 3.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain stretch - premature wear causes rattling noise and potential engine failure from 80k miles.
Camshaft actuator failure - P0017/P0018 codes common, often linked to chain tension issues.

cards.altText: Chevrolet Traverse LFY engine - petrol 3.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Stop-Start system sensor faults - electrical issues on 2021+ models with enhanced Stop-Start.
Oil consumption on high-mileage units - monitor levels regularly after 100k miles.

cards.altText: Chevrolet Traverse LFX engine - petrol 3.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Transitional component variability - verify exact spec before ordering replacement.
Similar timing chain concerns as LLT - inspect early if purchasing used.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £4,195-£5,200 (supply only) Estimated from comparable 3.6L V6 units - actual quotes may vary.

commonProblems.h2: Chevrolet Traverse Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Chevrolet Traverse's 3.6L V6 petrol engine dominates UK replacement enquiries, with the LLT code (2009-2017) most affected by timing chain failure. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded timing components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this decision tool to compare realistic repair vs replacement costs.

problems.h4: Timing Chain Failure - Why Chevrolet Traverse LLT Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Chevrolet Traverse LS, LT, LTZ, Premier (2009-2017, LLT 3.6L V6)
problems.rootCause: The LLT's rear-mounted timing chain tensioner wears prematurely, allowing chain stretch that disrupts valve timing and can cause catastrophic interference.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Preventative Chain Replacement - Early intervention before failure
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing chain, tensioners, guides; labour-intensive transverse V6 access
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught before chain jump; prevents catastrophic damage

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt / Reconditioned Engine - Post-failure solution
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt LLT with upgraded timing components, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value post-failure; eliminates repeat risk with upgraded internals

problems.recommendation: On a Chevrolet Traverse valued £5,000-£15,000, a rebuilt engine at £3,995-£5,000 often represents better long-term value than a £2,000+ timing chain repair that doesn't address other wear items. We recommend replacement if the chain has already jumped or if the vehicle has exceeded 100k miles.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt LLT engine prices for your Chevrolet Traverse

problems.h4: Camshaft Actuator Failure - P0017/P0018 Codes on Chevrolet Traverse
problems.affectedModels: Chevrolet Traverse all trims (2009-2017, LLT; 2018+, LFY)
problems.rootCause: Oil starvation or timing chain stretch causes camshaft position sensors to trigger P0017/P0018 codes; often a symptom of underlying chain issues.

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Actuator & Sensor Replacement - Address codes only
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace camshaft actuators, position sensors, oil pressure switch
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix if chain is sound; codes likely to return if chain stretched

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt / Reconditioned Engine - Address root cause
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded timing system and fresh actuators
repairOptions.longevity: Eliminates repeat actuator failures; recommended if mileage >90k

problems.recommendation: P0017/P0018 codes on a Traverse are rarely isolated actuator failures. We recommend a full engine inspection before spending on actuators alone - if chain stretch is present, replacement is the only lasting solution.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Chevrolet Traverse P0017 P0018 engine repair

problems.h4: Oil Consumption & Low Pressure - Chevrolet Traverse 3.6L V6 Issues
problems.rootCause: Piston ring wear and PCV system issues cause excessive oil consumption; low oil accelerates timing chain and bearing wear.

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - PCV & Seal Replacement - Reduce consumption
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace PCV valve, valve cover gaskets, oil seals; flush system
repairOptions.longevity: May reduce consumption temporarily; won't fix worn rings

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt / Reconditioned Engine - Permanent solution
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with new rings, bearings, seals; upgraded components
repairOptions.longevity: Eliminates consumption issues; restores oil pressure reliability

problems.recommendation: If your Traverse is burning over 1L per 1,000 miles, topping up oil is a short-term fix only. We recommend replacement if consumption is severe or if low oil warnings have appeared - bearing damage may already be occurring.
problems.cta: Compare Chevrolet Traverse oil consumption engine replacement prices

problems.h4: Engine Misfire & No-Start Conditions - Chevrolet Traverse Diagnosis
problems.rootCause: Timing chain jump or severe stretch causes valve timing errors, leading to misfires, rough idle, or no-start conditions.

repairOptions.tier: Diagnostic & Minor Repair - Rule out ignition/fuel issues
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Scan codes, test coils, injectors, fuel pressure; basic timing check
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if timing is confirmed intact; misfires often chain-related

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt / Reconditioned Engine - Definitive fix
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with verified timing, new components, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for misfires with P0016-P0019 codes or no-start after rattling noise

problems.recommendation: A misfire accompanied by rattling on startup or P0016-P0019 codes almost certainly indicates timing chain failure. We recommend immediate replacement to avoid piston-valve contact and further damage.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Chevrolet Traverse misfire engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Chevrolet Traverse
finalCta.paragraph: The Chevrolet Traverse's 3.6L V6 is a powerful engine, but the LLT's timing chain vulnerability means many UK imports face premature replacement. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Chevrolet Traverse specialists who supply rebuilt engines with upgraded timing components and 12-month warranties. Avoid main dealer premiums and get back on the road with confidence.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Chevrolet Traverse Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Chevrolet Traverse and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Chevrolet Traverse Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Chevrolet Traverse production timeline, organised so UK import owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from specialists.

years.description: Launch years of the grey import Traverse, all powered by the LLT 3.6L V6 with the highest timing chain failure risk.
keyChanges: Chevrolet Traverse first introduced to UK as grey import from US
LLT 3.6L V6 engine fitted across all trims (LS, LT, LTZ)
knownFor: Highest concentration of timing chain failure complaints
Rattling noise on cold start is key warning symptom
P0017/P0018 camshaft codes common from 80k miles
years.cta: Get quotes for 2009-2012 Chevrolet Traverse replacement engines
years.ticker: Chevrolet Traverse timing chain failure • Chevrolet Traverse LLT engine replacement • Chevrolet Traverse 2011 engine rattling noise

years.description: Revised LLT components reduced but did not eliminate timing chain concerns; LFX transitional code appeared in 2017.
keyChanges: Minor facelift with updated styling and interior
LLT received revised timing chain tensioners (not a full redesign)
2017 model year introduced LFX transitional engine code
mainEngines: LLT - 3.6L petrol (LS / LT / LTZ / early Premier)
knownFor: Improved but not eliminated timing chain risk on LLT
LFX requires careful verification before ordering replacement
Oil consumption issues emerge on higher-mileage units
years.cta: Get quotes for 2013-2017 Chevrolet Traverse replacement engines

years.description: All-new platform with LFY engine featuring improved timing design, higher output and updated electronics.
keyChanges: LFY engine replaced LLT/LFX with improved timing components
Higher power output (310-318hp) and updated infotainment
knownFor: Significantly reduced timing chain failure reports
LFY not directly interchangeable with LLT due to ECU/harness differences
Stop-Start system not yet fitted in this generation
years.cta: Get quotes for 2018-2020 Chevrolet Traverse replacement engines

years.description: Current-generation Traverse adds Stop-Start technology to the LFY engine, improving fuel economy but adding electrical complexity.
keyChanges: Stop-Start system integrated into LFY engine management
Minor styling updates and enhanced safety features
True North limited edition variant introduced for UK imports
mainEngines: LFY - 3.6L petrol with Stop-Start (Premier / High Country / RS / True North)
knownFor: Stop-Start sensor faults reported on early 2021+ units
LFY Stop-Start engines require compatible ECU programming
Highest value variants command premium replacement prices
years.cta: Get quotes for 2021+ Chevrolet Traverse replacement engines
years.ticker: Chevrolet Traverse Stop-Start engine • Chevrolet Traverse LFY 2021+ • Chevrolet Traverse True North engine

faq.h2: Chevrolet Traverse Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Chevrolet Traverse engine in the UK?
items.answer: A rebuilt Chevrolet Traverse engine typically costs £3,995-£5,500 supply-only, with labour adding £800-£1,500 for supply & fit. Used engines start around £1,295 but carry higher risk.
keyPoints: LLT rebuilt engines: £3,995-£5,000 supply only
LFY rebuilt engines: £4,295-£5,500 supply only
Labour for supply & fit: £800-£1,500 depending on location
Used engines: £1,295-£2,500 but verify compression and history
items.cta: Compare Chevrolet Traverse engine replacement costs today

items.question: Is the Chevrolet Traverse LLT engine reliable?
items.answer: The LLT 3.6L V6 (2009-2017) has a well-documented timing chain failure risk, particularly on 2009-2012 models, making it one of the least reliable Traverse engines.
keyPoints: Timing chain stretch common from 80k-120k miles
Rattling noise on cold start is the key warning symptom
P0017/P0018 codes often indicate chain or actuator issues
Rebuilt units with upgraded chains address the root cause
items.cta: Get quotes for rebuilt LLT Chevrolet Traverse engines

items.question: Can I fit a 2018 LFY engine in my 2011 Chevrolet Traverse?
items.answer: No, LLT (2009-2017) and LFY (2018+) engines are not directly interchangeable due to different ECUs, wiring harnesses and sensor configurations.
keyPoints: LLT and LFY have different engine management systems
Wiring harness and sensor locations do not match
ECU programming is engine-code specific
Always match engine code to your original specification
items.cta: Verify your Chevrolet Traverse engine code before ordering

items.question: What are the signs of timing chain failure on a Chevrolet Traverse?
items.answer: Key signs include rattling noise on cold start, check engine light with P0016-P0019 codes, rough idle, misfires, or a no-start condition after the chain has jumped.
keyPoints: Metallic rattling from front of engine on cold startup
P0017/P0018 camshaft position correlation codes
Rough idle or misfires on rear cylinder bank
Engine cranks but won't start if chain has jumped
items.cta: Compare Chevrolet Traverse timing chain replacement options

items.question: How long should a Chevrolet Traverse 3.6L engine last?
items.answer: With proper maintenance, LFY engines (2018+) can reach 150k-200k miles; LLT engines (2009-2017) often fail earlier due to timing chain issues at 80k-120k miles.
keyPoints: LLT: typical failure 80k-120k miles without preventative work
LFY: improved design, often reaches 150k+ miles
Regular oil changes with 5W-30 critical for longevity
Timing chain inspection recommended at 80k miles on LLT
items.cta: Check Chevrolet Traverse engine lifespan options

items.question: What oil should I use in my Chevrolet Traverse 3.6L engine?
items.answer: Use full synthetic 5W-30 oil, capacity 5.7 litres; correct oil specification is critical to prevent timing chain and actuator wear on the LLT engine.
keyPoints: Specification: GM dexos1 Gen 2 or later approved
Capacity: 5.7 litres including filter change
Change interval: 7,500-10,000 miles maximum
Low-quality oil accelerates timing chain wear
items.cta: Find Chevrolet Traverse engine oil and service specialists

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine in a Chevrolet Traverse?
items.answer: Yes, if your Traverse is valued £5,000-£15,000, a rebuilt engine at £3,995-£5,000 often represents better value than scrapping or expensive dealer repairs.
keyPoints: Compare vehicle value versus replacement cost
Rebuilt engine includes 12-month warranty for peace of mind
Supply & fit available nationwide to simplify the process
Avoid main dealer pricing by using specialist network
items.cta: Calculate if your Chevrolet Traverse is worth engine replacement

items.question: Do Chevrolet Traverse engines come with a warranty?
items.answer: Yes, all engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty; confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before purchase.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month warranty standard on rebuilt units
Warranty covers parts and typically labour if supply & fit arranged
Keep service records to maintain warranty validity
Confirm whether warranty is UK-wide or supplier-local
items.cta: Compare Chevrolet Traverse engine warranty terms

items.question: How do I find my Chevrolet Traverse engine code?
items.answer: The engine code is the 8th digit of your VIN (W for 3.6L V6) or stamped on the engine block behind the alternator; enter your registration above for instant verification.
keyPoints: 8th digit of VIN = W for all Traverse 3.6L engines
Block stamp location: behind alternator, passenger side
LLT, LFX and LFY all share VIN code W - verify by model year
Use our registration lookup for instant code confirmation
items.cta: Identify your Chevrolet Traverse engine code instantly

items.question: Can I get a Chevrolet Traverse engine delivered UK-wide?
items.answer: Yes, all engines are delivered on pallets via specialist courier to any UK mainland address; supply & fit services can arrange collection from partner garages.
keyPoints: Pallet delivery required due to ~180kg engine weight
Delivery typically 2-5 working days after order confirmation
Supply & fit options include mobile fitting or local garage collection
Inspect engine on delivery before signing for acceptance
items.cta: Arrange UK delivery for your Chevrolet Traverse engine
